# jellyfin_metadata_configuration (Data Source)

Retrieves the Jellyfin server metadata configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_metadata_configuration" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `config_json` (String) The full metadata configuration as a JSON string.
